name: 智能告警修复-墨西哥-统一平台模板

parameters.command: ssh -p 36000 root@172.20.220.165 'echo '"'"'========== 墨西哥 智能告警修复平台 =========='"'"'; echo '"'"'平台目录: /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; if [ ! -d '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' ]; then echo '"'"'平台代码不存在，开始首次 clone'"'"'; git clone '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "clone 失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; else echo '"'"'平台代码目录已存在，跳过首次 clone'"'"'; fi; cd '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "进入平台目录失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; echo '"'"'本节点不更新代码；如需更新，请单独执行【拉取最新代码】节点'"'"'; echo "当前版本: $(git log -1 --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; if [ -f .env.local ]; then echo '"'"'加载 .env.local'"'"'; set -a; source .env.local; set +a; else echo '"'"'未发现 .env.local，使用 n8n 内置变量'"'"'; fi; export APP_COUNTRY='"'"'mx'"'"'; export APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; export DS_ENVIRONMENT_CODE='"'"'12813621425120'"'"'; export DS_TENANT_CODE='"'"'dolphinscheduler'"'"'; export TV_API_URL='"'"'https://tv-service-alert.kuainiu.chat/alert/v2/array'"'"'; export TV_BOT_ID='"'"'163ad872-4b4d-4493-8ec7-838f8eb9848d'"'"'; export TV_MENTIONS='"'"'kuiwu@kn.group,enzodeng@kn.group'"'"'; export WORKFLOW_CODE_ROOT='"'"'/data/git/starrocks/workflow'"'"'; export WORKFLOW_CODE_COUNTRY='"'"'mx'"'"'; export REPAIR_WORKFLOW_CONFLICT_WAIT_SECONDS='"'"'300'"'"';  echo '"'"'开始执行: 智能修复'"'"'; LOCK_DIR='"'"'/tmp/intelligent_alarm_repair_mx.lockdir'"'"'; echo "并发锁目录: $LOCK_DIR"; if ! mkdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; then echo '"'"'已有智能修复任务运行中，跳过本次执行'"'"'; exit 0; fi; trap "rmdir \"$LOCK_DIR\"" EXIT; python3 core/repair_strict_7step.py; code=$?; echo "执行完成，退出码: $code"; exit "$code"'

ssh -p 36000 root@172.20.220.165 'echo '"'"'========== 墨西哥 智能告警修复平台 =========='"'"'; echo '"'"'平台目录: /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; if [ ! -d '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' ]; then echo '"'"'平台代码不存在，开始首次 clone'"'"'; git clone '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "clone 失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; else echo '"'"'平台代码目录已存在，跳过首次 clone'"'"'; fi; cd '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "进入平台目录失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; echo '"'"'开始拉取最新代码'"'"'; git remote set-url origin '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "设置远端失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; git fetch origin master || { code=$?; echo "fetch 失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; git reset --hard origin/master || { code=$?; echo "reset 失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; echo "当前版本: $(git log -1 --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; echo '"'"'拉取完成'"'"''
